message:
feat: Implement real SMTP and IMAP socket operations

smtplib.zig - Real SMTP socket I/O:
- connect(): Socket creation, timeout, TCP connect to server
- getReply(): Read and parse multi-line SMTP responses (code + message)
- putCmd(): Send commands over socket

imaplib.zig - Real IMAP4 socket I/O:
- open(): Socket creation, timeout, connect, read welcome
- sendCommand(): Send tagged commands, read responses
- Parse OK/NO/BAD response types
